name: Cole Spring Plaza
approxRentRange: $2,499/mo for 2BR (1,348 sq ft, 1 unit observed available June 2026); 1BR $1,775-$1,915/mo; studio $1,425-$1,540/mo
bathroomsNote: 2BR units are listed as 2BD/2BA (1,348 sq ft) on RentCafe and Zumper. 1BR units are 1BA.

notes.doorman: Multiple independent listing sources (RentCafe, ApartmentList, PadMapper, Zumper) consistently describe a '24-hour front desk' plus concierge service. Leasing office hours are Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm; front desk is separately confirmed as 24-hour.
notes.pool: PadMapper and Zumper describe a 'neighboring swimming pool,' implying the pool is adjacent but possibly shared or external. One Zumper review noted the pool was closed both summers the reviewer lived there. RentCafe does not list pool as an on-site amenity. Honest call is Unclear pending direct confirmation.
notes.inUnitLaundry: All sources consistently list shared on-site laundry only; no in-unit washer/dryer mentioned anywhere.
notes.balcony: Private patios/balconies confirmed as a unit feature across RentCafe, ApartmentList, PadMapper, and Zumper. Availability may vary by unit and floor.
notes.petFriendly: Cats only; up to 2 per household; $250 refundable deposit per cat; $25/month pet rent per cat. No dogs mentioned as permitted in any source.
notes.unitClimate: Air conditioning is listed as a unit amenity. However, 'most utilities included in rent' (per RentCafe) suggests heat may be building-supplied. Unit-level control over both heat and AC not confirmed; marked Unclear.
notes.wellMaintained: RentCafe shows a 4.0/5 rating (10 reviews) with residents praising 'professionalism and care' over 25+ years and describing 'top-notch management and maintenance.' ApartmentList reviews cite cleanliness. Built 1967, 10-12 stories, 273 units.
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR floor plans confirmed (1,348 sq ft, 2BA). No 1BR+den floor plan identified; sources list studio, 1BR, and 2BR only.
notes.buildingType: Residential rental apartment building managed by Ross Companies. Not a condo ownership building.
notes.packageRoom: Package receiving/package service confirmed across RentCafe, Zumper, and search aggregators.
notes.gym: Fitness center confirmed across RentCafe, ApartmentList, and Zumper photos.
